<?php /** * Writes default type for all objects. Currently only supports flash. */ class HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform_SafeObject extends HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform { /** * @type string */ public $name = "SafeObject"; /** * @param array $attr * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return array */ public function transform($attr, $config, $context) { if (!isset($attr['type'])) { $attr['type'] = 'application/x-shockwave-flash'; } return $attr; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
